ohtani.title: Justin Wrobleski, Shohei Ohtani lead Dodgers' 4-2 win
ohtani.blurb: Shohei Ohtani homers as part of a three-hit game and Justin Wrobleski strikes out nine to lead the Dodgers to a 4-2 win over the Phillies

imanaga.title: Velázquez, Saggese and Herrera power Cardinals to win
imanaga.blurb: Nelson Velázquez, Thomas Saggese and Iván Herrera each homered as the Cardinals' bullpen tossed six innings of one-run ball in a 6-5 win

suzuki.title: Velázquez, Saggese and Herrera power Cardinals to win
suzuki.blurb: Nelson Velázquez, Thomas Saggese and Iván Herrera each homered as the Cardinals' bullpen tossed six innings of one-run ball in a 6-5 win

yoshida.title: Guardians hold on after early rally for 4-3 win
yoshida.blurb: The Guardians rally for four runs in the 1st and hold on with a solid bullpen performance for a 4-3 win over the Red Sox

okamoto.title: Blue Jays storm back late for 6-5 win
okamoto.blurb: Charles McAdoo homers for his first career hit and Vladimir Guerrero Jr. drives in the go-ahead run for a comeback 6-5 win vs. the Orioles

murakami.title: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in the 10th inning and Rikuu Nishida collects his first RBI in the White Sox 4-3 win over the Tigers

matsui.title: Jackson Merrill's late homer powers Padres to 7-5 win
matsui.blurb: Jackson Merrill's go-ahead home run in the 7th inning lifts the Padres to a 7-5 win over the Nationals
